stories.thread: Arrest of British Citizens in Turkey
stories.story: Nine British citizens were arrested in Turkey on Wednesday, suspected of trying to cross illegally into Syria. The Turkish military announced the arrests on its website, stating that the group was apprehended at the Turkey-Syria border.
key_facts: Nine British citizens arrested
Arrested in Turkey on Wednesday
Suspected of trying to cross illegally into Syria
Turkish military announced on its website
Arrested at the Turkey-Syria border

stories.story: The group of nine British citizens arrested in Turkey included four children, three men, and two women. The oldest child was reported to be 10 or 11 years old, while the youngest was born in 2013. All nine individuals possessed British passports, according to a Turkish official who spoke to CNN on condition of anonymity.
key_facts: Group included four children
Oldest child 10 or 11
Youngest child born in 2013
Three men and two women accompanied the children
All nine had British passports
Information from a Turkish official to CNN on condition of anonymity

stories.thread: Context of Syria and Unknown Motives
stories.story: It was not stated why the group of nine British citizens allegedly was trying to get into Syria. Syria has been torn by a roughly four-year war between Syrian government forces and Islamist extremist groups and other rebels. Among the war's combatants is ISIS, which has taken over parts of Syria and Iraq for what it claims is its Islamic caliphate and is known to have been recruiting Westerners.
key_facts: Syria torn by a roughly four-year war
Combatants include Syrian government forces, Islamist extremist groups, and other rebels
ISIS is among the war's combatants
ISIS has taken over parts of Syria and Iraq
ISIS claims an Islamic caliphate
ISIS is known to recruit Westerners
explicit_unknowns: It was not stated why the group allegedly was trying to get into Syria

stories.story: The British Foreign Office stated on Wednesday that it is aware of reports of the arrests and is seeking information about the incident from Turkish authorities. Separately, UK police charged a man with terror offenses following a trip to Turkey.
key_facts: British Foreign Office aware of reports of arrests
British Foreign Office seeking information from Turkish authorities
British Foreign Office statement on Wednesday
UK police charged a man with terror offenses
Charge followed a Turkey trip
